Codesign New Products
P2P Marketplace

A Platform for Collaborating on Creativity


Using smart contract as the infrastructure, LookRev creates an ecosystem, where product makers can sell custom products and earn income using blockchain.



LookRev P2P design and marketing tools help consumers codesign products and find the right product-market-fit.

Using LookRev branch, product creators and contributors form a product line, encode the payment distribution mechanism on the blockchain using a smart contract.


LookRev branch records the state and metadata of a creative product line using blockchain technology via a smart contract.


Upon the sell of a product, product creators and the people who contributed to the product line are automatically rewarded for their contribution.


LooksCoin


LooksCoin ($LOOK) is a functional utility token. It can be used to purchase goods and services on the LookRev marketplace, and stake a branch.

Product Catalogs

A Platform for Collaborating on Creativity


Changing the way how creative products are made and sold.

Transparent

Provides a trustworthy holistic view of the origin and attribution of creative products, and the people who contribute to its making.


Secure

Data is secured by the blockchain network. Cryptographic signatures guarantee the integrity of data.


Reliable

Records the contribution and share of interest of each party on the blockchain ledger, making it immutable and tamper proof.


Open Network

LookRev provides an open network in a space traditionally impassable, and builds a trustworthy foundation for collaboration.
